codeReview.summary: Manual scrutiny review of the worker handoff, progress log, and commit diff confirmed this packet restored the shared recovery baseline cleanly: stale CODE-RED access/finance expectations were realigned to the shipped auth and maker-checker contracts, the small runtime fixes stayed scoped to GRN/accounting reopen behavior, and the required recovery gates all passed on the branch before commit.
